creator: reed@wingeer.org
text:
I have reported this problem when FreeBSD 3.2

  ======================
  kern/15365: Fatal trap 18 (integer divide fault) when PCCARD hot plug-in again
  ======================

I have upgrade my ThinkPAD to FreeBSD 4.0, but this time system will hang when pcmcia ethernet adapter is plugged out and reboot when it is plugged in...

How-To-Repeat: plug-in or plug-out the pcmcia ethernet adapter
